_meta.purpose: Provenance-only defaults for Stage2.5 manual skeletons. These entries help operators start from trusted source families without pre-filling market values.
rules: source_url_template values are entry points, not proof. Replace them with the exact evidence URL before filling numeric values.
Policies must not contain numeric market fields such as current_value, previous_value, change_rate, current_price, current_rate, current_yield, recent_5d, or total_120d.
This config does not change Stage2.5 injector enforcement.

policies.note: Use plain Bloomberg Commodity Index close/last evidence only; reject total-return, sub-index, methodology, and weights pages.

policies.source: Stooq or iShares GSG market quote page
policies.note: Use a dated market quote for GSG; do not use broad commodity-index concept pages.

policies.source: ChinaMoney or CFETS official USD/CNY quote
policies.note: Use ChinaMoney/CFETS official USD/CNY evidence; keep a single explicit HTTPS URL.

policies.source: ChinaBond yield curve or explicit CN10Y plus observed CDB spread evidence
policies.estimation_method: CN10Y plus observed CDB spread, or direct ChinaBond CDB yield evidence when available
policies.note: If using a spread proxy, keep explicit spread provenance and leave is_estimated=true.

policies.source: National Bureau of Statistics industrial output release
policies.note: For 1-2 month cumulative year-on-year releases, set value_type=yoy_month and yoy_month explicitly.

policies.source: National Bureau of Statistics industrial enterprise revenue release
policies.note: Use the matching industrial enterprise revenue period from the NBS release.
BDI is estimated-allowlisted only when trusted domain, max age, value range, and unit keyword checks pass.
ETF fund-flow manual is downgraded disclosure only: news/quarterly values are estimates and do NOT clear the fund_flow gate; keep is_estimated=true.

policies.source: People's Bank of China reserve requirement ratio notice
policies.note: reserve_ratio quality replacement requires explicit is_estimated=false and one HTTPS PBoC URL; ChinaMoney does not release this override.

policies.source: People's Bank of China open market operation notice
policies.note: PBoC reverse-repo evidence must match the task reference date.

policies.source: People's Bank of China MLF operation notice
policies.note: MLF multi-price notices need PBoC URL evidence and an explicit reference-value marker such as multi-price or no unified rate.
